author: jmxo
description: Hide the cursor when scrolling and show it again when moving the mouse.
name: Auto Hide Cursor

releases.author: jmxo
releases.description:
## What's Changed

This release enhances the cursor hiding mechanism by hiding the cursor both immediately on scroll and after a delay of inactivity. Additionally, it adds a settings tab to customize these behaviors

* feat: hide cursor also on delay, add settings tab by @jmxo in https://github.com/jmxo/obsidian-auto-hide-cursor/pull/4
* new mode added and settings by @1C0D in https://github.com/jmxo/obsidian-auto-hide-cursor/pull/3

## New Contributors
* @1C0D made their first contribution in https://github.com/jmxo/obsidian-auto-hide-cursor/pull/3

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jmxo/obsidian-auto-hide-cursor/commits/1.1.0
